hero_subtitle: SFTY helps digital asset businesses apply role-based retention policies to Travel Rule messages and evidence while preserving audit-ready workflows and maintaining enterprise compliance governance.

problem_title: Travel Rule data retention creates compliance gaps
problem_description: Institutional teams struggle to maintain consistent retention of Travel Rule messages, statuses and related evidence across multiple providers and jurisdictions. This fragmentation slows audit readiness and complicates regulatory review of Travel Rule workflows and decision histories.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes retention of Travel Rule messages, statuses and audit evidence across providers and jurisdictions, creating a unified compliance record that supports traceable review and regulatory inspection readiness.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule messages to evidence retention
workflow_description: SFTY manages Travel Rule message routing, status updates and exceptions while preserving audit-ready evidence under defined retention and access policies.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond Travel Rule data. Evidence-ready retention
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides a provider-neutral layer that connects Travel Rule message outputs into structured cases, durable evidence, and audit-ready workflows for institutional compliance needs.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs that require controlled retention of Travel Rule data with provider-neutral workflows, evidence preservation, bank due diligence and secure enterprise deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule data retention?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance layer that structures Travel Rule messages, statuses and evidence with configurable retention policies to meet institutional governance and auditability requirements for VASPs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle Travel Rule evidence?
faq_2_answer: SFTY preserves Travel Rule case history, message status, decisions and evidence packages to support traceability and defensible records across compliance and supervisory workflows.
faq_3_question: Can SFTY preserve audit-ready decision logs?
faq_3_answer: Yes, SFTY records detailed decision logs and approval histories linked to Travel Rule events, supporting audit readiness and internal review for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_4_question: How does SFTY support enterprise deployment?
faq_4_answer: SFTY supports controlled deployment with role-based access, audit logs, configurable data retention and governance features tailored for enterprise compliance operations and bank due diligence.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above Travel Rule providers, connecting their outputs into structured workflows without replacing the underlying message routing or validation services.
final_title: Review Travel Rule retention and audit readiness
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports role-based retention, evidence preservation and compliance governance for Travel Rule workflows.
